# Character Mode — Character List (Pokemon Unbound v2.1.1.1)

At the Character Mode prompt during a new game, enter the number of the
character you want to play as. You may only catch and keep Pokemon from
that character's roster (canon teams, expanded to full evolution
families). Your starter is replaced by the character's own starter,
listed below. Off-roster gifts and trades are sent to your PC instead
of your party; off-roster wild Pokemon cannot be caught.
